title: Update tests for state rebuilder determinism and semantics
summary: Add deterministic rebuild, torn-state recovery, and semantic reconstruction tests for the transaction-aware state rebuilder.
outputs: New determinism, torn-state recovery, and semantic reconstruction cases
acceptance_criteria: Rebuild determinism is validated for identical event sequences.
Torn-state recovery paths are covered with corrupted tail events.
Integrity mismatch triggers rebuild from event log.
semantic_summary and user_intent reconstruction are validated under replay.
Tests assert correct next_action derivation with semantic intent handling.

steps.description: Add replay determinism tests comparing materialized state across runs.
Add torn-state recovery tests with invalid/corrupted tail events.
Validate semantic_summary and user_intent reconstruction under replay.
Assert next_action derivation with semantic intent present.

notes: Align expectations with 0.4.0 recovery algorithm and semantic memory rules.
